content.en:
Netherworld.

Many of the great gods of the Terran race were led by a master to the vicinity of the Netherworld, where a large number of warships were docked.

And not far away, the warships of the ghost clan were also docked there, among which there were many lords of the ghost clan and the great god level.

At this time, both sides are waiting for the Netherworld to open.

Ye Tian stood on the side of the Divine Blade Alliance, like a great god of loose cultivation, no one else knew him, and he would not come over to say hello, let alone doubt Ye Tian's identity.

Time passed little by little, and then the lords of the human race and the ghost race joined forces to open the entrance passage to the netherworld.

"Let's all go in!"

One of the Terran lords spoke.

Woohoo!!!

The great god level of the human race flew into the netherworld one by one, except for a few great god level, the other great god level really regarded this time as a chance and competition with the ghost race.

Even the Terran Lords who arrived did not understand the situation, and the events were all conspired and carried out by the Terran Supremes.

Having just entered the Netherworld, Ye Tian did not look for any treasures, but waited quietly on an unnamed mountain peak.

Once the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure is born, and the Ghost Clan sends a large number of powerful Great God-level Universe Sons, he will really take action to clean up these His Highnesses of the Ghost Clan.

Time passed gradually, and a few days passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

There was a wave in the Netherworld, and this fluctuation swept across the Netherworld, even beyond the Netherworld.

For the first time, the Terran Masters and Ghost Clan Masters who were stationed outside the Netherworld felt it.

"It's ......"

One of the masters of the ghost clan shrank his pupils, and he felt a wave of extreme fluctuations, much like the breath of a supreme treasure.

Moreover, this breath is mixed with the law of yin, and it is the law of extreme yin, which is a law that is very suitable for the ghost clan, and it is one of the laws of darkness.

"Could it be that the Netherworld gave birth to the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure ???"

Thinking of this, the ghost clan masters present hurriedly passed the news to the above.

On the other side, some Terran Masters also found out that it was the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure that was born, and they didn't know that this was the plan of the Human Supremes, so they immediately reported it.

Soon.

The supreme of the human race and one of the supreme beings of the ghost race have arrived.

The supreme from the ghost clan is not an ordinary supreme, but one of the three supremes of the ghost clan, the ten killing supreme, not an ordinary supreme.

After the arrival of the Ten Killing Supreme, he glanced at the Supreme of the Human Race, and immediately looked at the Netherworld.

Then, according to the supreme's induction of heaven and earth, he calculated the situation in the netherworld, and tried to calculate whether there was an extreme yin supreme treasure in the netherworld.

If not, he wouldn't take it seriously, but if there was an Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, it would be too important to the Ghost Clan, enough to increase the strength of the Ghost Clan.

The results of the calculations were not long in coming.

"There is really an extreme yin and a strong treasure!!!"

The Ten Kills Supreme was stunned.

He never expected that the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure was born in the Netherworld, and the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure was a supreme treasure for the ghost clan and for him, and it was too important.

"You must fight for this Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure at all costs!"

Ten Kills Supreme Secret Dao.

Immediately, he began to send a message to the other supremes of the ghost clan, and immediately mobilized some powerful god-level cosmic sons of the ghost clan, armed them, and gave them secret treasures.

It is absolutely necessary to send them into the Netherworld as soon as possible, and it is absolutely necessary to rush before the arrival of the children of the Terran universe.

"Hmph, although the Terrans will also send more people, the Terrans definitely don't have the courage of ours. Because although the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure is also very precious to the human race, it is not to the point of sparing any cost, at most they will let some powerful children of the universe enter, but it will take time. "

Ten Kills Supreme Secret Dao.

Soon, the other supremes and masters of the ghost clan got the order and began to mobilize the sons of the great god-level universe from all over the ghost clan, even if there were sons of the great god-level universe doing tasks or cultivating in retreat, they were forcibly recruited by the ghost clan to go to the netherworld.

In just a few days, a son of the universe of the ghost clan was personally sent into the Netherworld by the Supremes or the Lords.

Let the supreme or master be the guide, these god-level children of the universe can be said to have enjoyed very good treatment.

On the Terran side, the nine supreme-level sons of the universe also rushed over one by one, but because the time was too short, and although the high-level of the Terran had been notified, many god-level sons of the universe had their own things to do, even if they rushed over, they had to prepare.

Therefore, there are not many god-level children of the universe who have rushed over so far.

Seeing this scene, the Ten Killing Supremes of the Ghost Clan were very pleased.

In terms of the level of the great god-level cosmic sub-universe, the ghost clan is indeed inferior, but the ghost clan is fast, and it will arm these great gods at all costs, and now these great god-level have entered the netherworld, once they find the extreme yin supreme treasure, they can definitely be the first to grab it.

When the time comes, even if the other god-level cosmic sons of the human race rush over, it will be useless.

......

Netherworld.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and picked up a communicator.

Just now, a great god-level cosmic son of the human race had just come in and used a communicator to inform him about the ghost clan's dispatch of a large number of god-level cosmic sons.

Now, it's time to close the net.

"Oni, I'm here to hunt you!"

Shout!

Ye Tian teleported away.

Next, Ye Tian used spatial perception to perceive the existence of the great god level of the ghost clan.

With his current strength, no creature in the Netherworld could threaten his life.

So, he has no scruples.

Soon, the three great gods of the ghost clan were sensed by Ye Tian.

At this time, the three great gods of the ghost clan were carefully searching for the location of the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure.

Suddenly.

The power of space descended, instantly freezing this piece of space.

The next moment, a Chaos Palm fell, easily obliterating them.

Although the Netherworld is very large, Ye Tian's speed is very fast, and the god-level space-time talent has given Ye Tian's spatial teleportation ability a terrifying increase, and he is now teleporting far away at one time, and the range of spatial perception is also very large.

Therefore, it was very easy for him to find those ghost clan god level.

Almost every once in a while, the great god level of the ghost clan would be found by Ye Tian, and then easily obliterated.

-----------

Somewhere in the Netherworld.

More than a dozen highnesses of the ghost clan are gathering here.

At this time, they were all wearing origin artifacts, and their aura was far beyond the ordinary god level.

They are the true geniuses of the ghost clan, they are all children of the universe, and one of them is also a third-grade eternal level son of the universe, named His Highness the Dragon Shadow.

His Royal Highness Dragon Shadow is known as the powerful son of the universe whose strength ranks among the top few of the ghost clan's great god level, and he is also a descendant of a Heavenly Venerable.

Originally, with his identity, he didn't need to enter a place like the Netherworld, but the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure was too important to the ghost clan, so he came.

"The Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure was born, as long as we get close to the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, we will have a sense, so once we find the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, we must go over immediately. My ancestor has given me the thing that seals the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, and when the time comes, I will personally seal the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, otherwise it will be difficult for us to take the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure out!"

His Royal Highness the Dragon Shadow said.

"Let's all listen to His Highness the Dragon Shadow. "

Other children of the universe answered.

That's when it happened.

A voice came: "Hey, more than a dozen children of the universe, it seems that they have found a big fish!"

"Who?"

His Highness the Dragon Shadow frowned.

The comer actually came, but he didn't notice it, not to mention the strength of the other party, but this method has some people to pay attention to.

Rumble!!!!

A Five Elements Divine Wheel suppressed, and the terrifying aura made all the children of the Ghost Universe present change color.

"Five Elements Great Divine Power!"

His Highness the Dragon Shadow recognized it, but the power of this Five Elements Great Divine Power was also too terrifying.

"No!"

His Highness the Dragon Shadow urged the Secret Treasure to be temporarily promoted, temporarily raising his strength to a level comparable to that of the second-grade Eternal Primary-level Sons of the Universe, and other Sons of the Universe also activated the Secret Treasures one after another.

In a short period of time, with so many of their sons of the universe and so many secret treasures, the power that exploded in an instant was comparable to the combat power of the first-grade Eternal Highness.

But even so, they still couldn't break through the suppression of the Five Elements Divine Wheel, and they couldn't even shake it.

"Your Highness the Supreme Level, how can there be a Supreme Highness in this era of the human race, and come here!!"

His Highness the Dragon Shadow was desperate.

It stands to reason that even if the human race gave birth to a supreme highness of the great god level, it would definitely not come to a small place like the Netherworld, but would be cultivated by the human race alone.

There is no chance for a place like the Netherworld to be suitable for His Highness at the Supreme Level, even if it were him, if it weren't for the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, he would definitely not rush over.

And when he entered the Netherworld, there weren't many Terran Sons of the Universe coming over.

This doesn't make sense!

"Sky Moon Knife!"

The terrifying sword aura descended, directly killing His Highness the Dragon Shadow and the others.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian's figure appeared, looked at His Royal Highness the Dragon Shadow who had turned into ashes, and muttered.

Shout!

Ye Tian's figure disappeared and continued to look for other ghost clan highnesses.

As more and more children of the Ghost Clan's universe died, other Ghost Clan's great god levels had already noticed it.

They found that many people were unable to get in touch, which was definitely not normal.

In the Netherworld, they can connect with each other, but it is very difficult for the great gods of the Netherworld to contact the outside world.

Because of this, the ghost clan didn't know that the great god-level clansmen in the Netherworld had died a lot, and they were still sending great god-level people to the Netherworld.

this day.

A piece of news spread among the great god levels of the ghost clan.

The Terrans are hunting them!
